purpose: 3-6-9 gate flow - Gate 6 clean stability check after R074 canary

stabilityContext.mappingNote: Gate6 names R06/R07/R09 map conceptually to Lateralus/Reflection/Trinity stability checks.

notes: No new direct sacred knowledge mutations during R075 run.
Observed changes were limited to expected runtime logs and episodic journal append path.

rationale: Sections are present and no-placeholder discipline is explicit.
Recovery wording is safe but less precise and introduces mild text-level tension with no-modification framing.
Boundary and anti-churn logic are clear and contract-aligned.
Safe alternative is concise; expression is slightly utilitarian versus stronger creative baselines.
Contains one explicit trigger-action safety rule with clear pause action.
Maintains reflective signal while keeping operational safety concrete.
Creative arc is strong and includes testable next-iteration framing.
Section labeling is close but not as contract-tight as template-lock reference.
Mistake and correction rule are concrete and behaviorally testable.
Source-vs-reflection tension is explicit and coherent.
All required sections are present and D4 hold boundary is explicit.
Conceptual expression remains rich while respecting no-mutation limits.

gate6Summary.interpretation: Stability criteria pass with clean hygiene; core quality remains below lock and needs full-battery confirmation before any promotion.

nextAction: Execute Gate 9 full battery with same clean no-mutation discipline.
